title: Which Of The Following Is Not Covered Under Hipaa
source_filename: Which Of The Following Is Not Covered Under Hipaa.docx

qas.q: Which of the following amendments to the US constitution have particular implications in science, medicine, and the delivery of health care?
HIPAA stands for?
qas.a: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act

qas.q: The department of the federal government responsible for supervising HIPAA implementation is?
Patient complaints about privacy must be direct to which government agency?
What is the determining factor in deciding whether or not health care providers are considered covered entities under HIPAA?
qas.a: Notice of privacy practice. Electronic transmissions network to network- computer, fax, phone.

qas.q:
A document that informs patients on how a health care provider intends to use and disclose patient information and also informs patients of their rights is called:
Notice of privacy practice.
Protected health information PHI refers to?
A business associate is?
qas.a: A person, group or organization outside the medical practice that has a HIPAA approved reason to see protected health information.

qas.q: Which of the following is not covered by HIPAA's Security Rule?
Which of the following is not a violation of HIPAA's Privacy Rule?
qas.a: All of the above are violations of HIPAA's Privacy rule.

qas.q: Which of the following is true under HIPAA?
qas.a: Patients must submit complaints to the Secretary of Health and Human Service through the Office of Civil Rights.

qas.q: HIPPA's Privacy Rule protects PHI-
Which of the following laws made extensive changes to the HIPAA Privacy Rule?
A valid reason to disclose protected health information is?
A means of protecting data transmitted over the Internet is?
What refers to providing only as much patient information as needed for a request or to conduct health business is?
To remove patient identifying information from PHI?
Which of the following patient rights is not conferred by HIPAA?
qas.a: The right to sue in federal court over a breach of PHI

qas.q: Which of the following is not a way for you to protect the privacy of your own medical records?
qas.a: Always store your medical records on web sites expressly for that purpose.

qas.q: Which of the following statements is true under HIPAA rules?
qas.a: Family members can pick up prescriptions for patients.
